title: Crunchy Show-off Tunisian Paneer Stir-fry
description: A sweet and crunchy twist on a traditional Tunisian dish featuring paneer, with added toast for texture and sweetness. Whole30-friendly and suitable for those following specific dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: 2 cups paneer cubes
ingredients.notes: Ensure not to exceed recommended cooking temperatures for cheese

instructions: Spread the paneer cubes on a baking sheet and lightly toast them in the preheated oven for about 10-12 minutes until golden brown, flipping halfway through. Remove from oven and set aside.
In a large skillet over medium heat, melt the unsalted butter and sauté the chopped onion until translucent and soft.
Add minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, stirring frequently.
Toss in thinly sliced bell peppers and continue cooking for about 5 minutes or until peppers are slightly softened but still crisp.
Fold in mint leaves and honey (or simple syrup), adjusting sweetness according to your taste preference. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Increase heat to medium-high, pour the toasted paneer cubes into the skillet, mixing them in with the bell pepper mixture for 2-3 minutes until heated through.
Season with a pinch of cayenne pepper if desired and serve immediately.
Serve alongside a side of whole grain bread or quinoa salad for a complete meal.
